name: anvil-and-code
description: Production-grade Claude skills for builders. Engineered for reliability, not demos.

plugins.name: skill-validator
plugins.description: Audit any SKILL.md. Get a scored report (0-10) with critical issues, warnings, triggering score, and exact fixes. Free forever.

plugins.name: description-optimizer
plugins.description: Rewrite your SKILL.md description to actually trigger. Scores current version, generates 3 optimized variants, picks a winner. Free forever.

plugins.name: skill-scaffolder
plugins.description: Generate a complete production-ready SKILL.md from a plain English description. Intake interview, architecture decision, quality gate, test scaffold included.

plugins.name: skill-security-auditor
plugins.description: Scan any SKILL.md for path traversal, code injection, unsafe shell calls, and prompt injection vectors. Security report with severity ratings and fixes.

plugins.name: skill-tester
plugins.description: Generate comprehensive test cases, edge cases, and validation scenarios for any SKILL.md. Catches failures before your users do.

plugins.name: multi-platform-converter
plugins.description: Adapt any SKILL.md for Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and other AI coding environments. One skill, four ecosystems.

plugins.name: skill-bundler
plugins.description: Package multiple skills into a GitHub marketplace-ready repo with proper manifest, README, and install instructions.

plugins.name: skill-doc-generator
plugins.description: Generate buyer-ready documentation for any skill: README, install instructions, usage examples, and troubleshooting guide.

plugins.name: prompt-compressor
plugins.description: Optimize token efficiency in any SKILL.md. Cuts file size without losing instruction fidelity. Faster loading, lower context cost.

plugins.name: progressive-disclosure-organizer
plugins.description: Restructure any SKILL.md for lazy loading. Main file stays under 5K tokens, supporting files load on demand. Required for large skills.

plugins.name: skill-marketplace-formatter
plugins.description: Prepare skill listings for SkillsMP, claudemarketplaces.com, claudeskills.info, and SkillHub. Each platform has different format requirements — this handles all of them.

plugins.name: license-key-injector
plugins.description: Add Gumroad license key validation and buyer watermarking to any SKILL.md. The anti-piracy stack for skill sellers, reusable on every skill you ship.
